query:
SELECT l.id, l.businessOwnerId, l.address, l.zipCode, l.lat, l.lng, bo.businessName, bo.clientPortalVisible
FROM locations l
JOIN business_owners bo ON bo.id = l.businessOwnerId
ORDER BY l.businessOwnerId, l.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AafxdxuLDwTXdt.root --database Dw4mhfnuurFcniLsqjLpWN --execute

FROM locations l
JOIN business_owners bo ON bo.id = l.businessOwnerId
ORDER BY l.businessOwnerId, l.id;
